title: Scope
full_text:
6.4.1.1 Scope
Scope
1) Subject to the limitations stated in Article 6.4.1.2., where the service water
heating system does not comply with the requirements of Section 6.2., it shall comply
with Part 8.

sentences.text: Subject to the limitations stated in Article 6.4.1.2., where the service water heating system does not comply with the requirements of Section 6.2., it shall comply with Part 8.
